mapper.delete: delete from sys_user_post where user_id=#{userId} and platform_no=#{platformNo}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user_post where post_id=#{postId}
select count(1) from sys_user_post where post_id=#{postId} and platform_no=#{platformNo}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_user_post where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_post(user_id, post_id, platform_no) values
(#{item.userId},#{item.postId},#{item.platformNo})
